name: va-medicaid-policy
note: Virginia DMAS MES Provider Manuals Library. 22 per-service manuals, each split into Ch 1–6 PDFs (Ch I/III shared across all manuals). Direct /sites/default/files/ PDF links, curl 200, no login. No standalone Laboratory manual — lab covered under Practitioner Ch IV.

_comment: DMAS MES Drupal site. 22 manual hubs at /pdf_chapter/<slug>; each lists Ch 1–6+ PDFs. Ch I (General) and Ch III (Member Eligibility) are shared files across every manual. Captured Ch IV/V/VI from the 6 detector-relevant manuals (Transportation, Home Health, CCC+ Waiver, Practitioner, DME, Pharmacy) + Hospital Ch IV + Telehealth supplement. PDF filenames embed revision dates — will drift; re-scrape /pdf_chapter/<slug> for current href. Index + sub-pages + PDFs all curl 200.
